meta.title: How to Digitize Your Store — vngoweb
meta.description: A 4-step guide to building a website, getting your QR code and digitizing your store with vngoweb — no coding needed, just 5 minutes.

heading: Digitize Your Store With vngoweb
subheading: Even with zero coding experience, it takes just 5 minutes to bring your entire store online.

steps.title: Explore & Pick a Template
steps.desc: Visit the Template Store and try a design tailored to your industry — Spa, Cafe, Restaurant or Retail.

steps.title: Edit Your Store Details
steps.desc: Update your store name, Zalo phone number, text logo and color palette, and edit your menu and price list with ease.

steps.title: Get a Dynamic QR Code
steps.desc: The system automatically generates a QR code for your website. Print stickers for your tables so customers can scan and view the menu instantly.

steps.title: Automated Order Handling
steps.desc: Customers browse your products and send requests or payments. You get notified so you can prepare their order right away.

support.title: Want a complete setup done for you — completely free?
support.desc: The vngoweb technical team is ready to set up your store, photograph your products and enter your full menu — free of charge!
support.connecting: Connecting you to a Zalo support agent: {{phone}} — Please wait a moment.
